keywords.name: cycle-sequence
keywords.description: List the doubles indicating the cycle point and names of the cycle entries in the cycle sequence. This information is useful when installing FISH callback events with the fish callback command. The following table lists the reserved cycle points:

keywords.name: directory
keywords.description: List the current working directory and the application directory.

keywords.name: key-information
keywords.description: Look for a valid Itasca security key directly connected to the computer and report all of the information on it. The key does not have to contain a valid license for this code, it may be for any Itasca code.

keywords.name: information
keywords.description: General program settings and status, including the customer title and the number of target threasds to use.

keywords.name: memory
keywords.description: List the amount of memory that is actively being used.

keywords.name: module
keywords.description: List the module DLLs that are loaded.

keywords.name: plugins
keywords.description: List the plugin DLLs that are loaded.

keywords.name: trend
keywords.description: List the six components of a stress tensor given principal values and directions. All three principal values must be given and are given in the order of the minimum, intermediate and maximum principal stress values in v . At least two directions are required to fully specify the stress tensor as given below. Specify the intermediate direction with the following keywords: The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by azimuth and plunge , in degrees. The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by dip and dip-direction , in degrees. The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by dip and dip-direction , in degrees. The direction specified direction as a normal vector. The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by azimuth and plunge , in degrees. A synonym to azimuth Specify the minimum direction with the following keywords: The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by azimuth and plunge , in degrees. The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by dip and dip-direction , in degrees. The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by dip and dip-direction , in degrees. The direction specified direction as a normal vector. The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by azimuth and plunge , in degrees. A synonym to azimuth Specify the maximum direction with the following keywords: The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by azimuth and plunge , in degrees. The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by dip and dip-direction , in degrees. The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by dip and dip-direction , in degrees. The direction specified direction as a normal vector. The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by azimuth and plunge , in degrees. A synonym to azimuth

keywords.name: security
keywords.description: Look for a valid license (using the current configuration settings) and report the contents of the license if found. The license may direct (local key) or network (network key).

keywords.name: serial
keywords.description: List the serial number of the security key.

keywords.name: version
keywords.description: List the full program version information. This information should be reported if a problem arises while using the code.

keywords.name: directory

keywords.name: symbols
keywords.description: List FISH information. By default all FISH symbols are listed. Alternatively specific FISH symbols can be listed. List all FISH arrays that have been created. A basic list of all global FISH symbols. List the FISH functions that have been added to be executed as callbacks (i.e., with the fish callback command). List the callback events that have been registered. For instance, the solve_complete event is a registered callback event. [CS: is the base list of events shown anywhere??] List the FISH pseudo-code generated after parsing FISH syntax. If a specific symbol s is provided, only the code for that specific function is listed. Otherwise the pseudo-code for all functions will be listed. For FISH values of an aggregate type (arrays, matrices, structures, maps, etc.) this will list the contents of the type in a structured way. List the complete set of FISH intrinsics, both built-in and user-defined. If the string s is given, only those intrinsics that contain s in the name will be listed. List of all memory objects allocated. See the FISH function memory.create . List defined FISH structures, including their member names and values. List all FISH symbols.

keywords.name: trend
keywords.description: This is a utility that determines the six components of a stress tensor given principal values ( fs1 fs2 fs3 and directions. All three principal values must be given. Two directions are required: Specify the intermediate value. You may specify the intermediate direction with the following keywords: The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by azimuth and plunge , in degrees. The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by dip and dip-direction , in degrees. The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by dip and dip-direction , in degrees. The direction specified direction as a normal vector. The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by azimuth and plunge , in degrees. A synonym to azimuth Specify the minimum value. You may specify the intermediate direction with the following keywords: The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by azimuth and plunge , in degrees. The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by dip and dip-direction , in degrees. The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by dip and dip-direction , in degrees. The direction specified direction as a normal vector. The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by azimuth and plunge , in degrees. A synonym to azimuth Specify the maximum value. You may specify the intermediate direction with the following keywords: The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by azimuth and plunge , in degrees. The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by dip and dip-direction , in degrees. The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by dip and dip-direction , in degrees. The direction specified direction as a normal vector. The direction being specified as the normal to a plane given by azimuth and plunge , in degrees. A synonym to azimuth

keywords.name: cycle-sequence
keywords.description: List the doubles indicating the cycle point and names of the cycle entries in the cycle sequence. This information is useful when installing FISH callback events with the fish callback command. The following table lists the reserved cycle points: Cycle Point Cycle Operation -10 Validate the data structures 0 Determine a stable timestep 10 Equations of motion (or thermal bodies update) 15 Body coupling between processes 20 Increment time 30 Update the cell space 35 Create/delete contacts 40 Force-Displacement law (or thermal contact update) 42 Accumulate deterministic quantities 45 Contact coupling between processes 60 Second pass of equations of motion 70 Thermal calculations 80 Fluid calculations

List the complete set of FISH intrinsics, both built-in and user-defined. If the string s is given, only those intrinsics that contain s in the name will be listed.
